recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Drama, Mystery, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In a Mars base, the inhabitants are being infected by a mysterious water creature which takes over its victims. The Doctor is thrust into the middle of this catastrophe, knowing a larger one is waiting around the corner.

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Jungle
recommendations.overview: A company retreat on a tropical island goes terribly awry.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Crocosaurus
recommendations.overview: When the prehistoric warm-water beast the Crocosaurus crosses paths with that cold-water monster the Mega Shark, all hell breaks loose in the oceans as the world's top scientists explore every option to halt the aquatic frenzy. Swallowing everything

recommendations.title: Lost Boys: The Thirst
recommendations.overview: A mysterious fiend uses a designer drug to turn partiers at an all-night rave into his personal army of never-say-die bloodsuckers.

recommendations.title: Open Water
recommendations.overview: Two divers are left out at sea without a boat. There’s nothing but water for miles, unless they look at what’s underneath them...

recommendations.title: The Last Survivors
recommendations.overview: In the near future, society collapses and water becomes scarce. When a greedy water baron starts violently clearing out survivors, Kendal, a 17-year-old teenager, fights the baron's henchman to keep a well open.

recommendations.title: Satanic
recommendations.overview: Four friends on their way to Coachella stop off in Los Angeles to tour true-crime occult sites, only to encounter a mysterious young runaway who puts them on a terrifying path to ultimate horror.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place Part II
recommendations.overview: Following the events at home, the Abbott family now face the terrors of the outside world. Forced to venture into the unknown, they realize that the creatures that hunt by sound are not the only threats that lurk beyond the sand path.

recommendations.title: Sharktopus
recommendations.overview: The U.S. Navy's special group "Blue Water" builds a half-shark, half-octopus for combat. But the sharktopus escapes and terrorizes the beaches of Puerto Vallarta.
